body: Non non t'inquiète, Émile vient souper ce soir il peut passer les chercher. T'as au moins déjeuné toi avant le shift?
Mon cher — t'as vu mes lunettes de lecture? Les ai oubliées chez toi ce matin. Ça fait deux heures que j'essaie de lire le Devoir sur l'iPad comme un vrai idiot 😒
Un croissant du lobby, ça compte 😶. Je texte Émile. Bonne journée Papa.
Ha. Elles sont sur le comptoir côté fenêtre. Jess et moi on finit à 15h au Hawthorne, je peux passer après si tu veux pas attendre.
she really is lol. also heads up — papa already texted ME asking what time to show up Thursday. you have like 6 hours. bonne chance 🫡
tell him Jess has strict kitchen rules and you literally cannot override them. she'll back you up, she always does 😂
mon dieu you're devious. already asked her — réponse immédiate: 'obviously, text me what to say.' I could cry. she carries the whole Hawthorne on her back.

papa just texted asking if he can come 'assist' at my Thursday catering set. sweet man but he nearly dismantled my whole mise en place at Christmas. need a soft out that doesn't become a three-day guilt trip.
Hey, Papa mentioned you two do coffee every morning now? That's cute lol. Can I come Thursday? I'm off and I miss him.
It's not really a thing you crash, Nat. It's just us, the Beaverton Starbucks, and 6am. You sure you want that energy?
Yves. It's coffee with our father, not a private club. I'll bring the good pain au chocolat from that place on Morrison. Deal?
Fine. But I'm warning you — he's gonna spend the whole time asking why you're not calling Émile back. don't @ me.
c'était pas moi c'était Émile et tu le sais très bien. Venez dimanche, j'apporte les restes. Sienna vient aussi si ça te dérange pas grand-père 👀
je suis concierge pas sommelier mais... oui j'ai une bouteille. On arrive vers 16h dimanche.
Sienna! Enfin. Amène-la. Et du vin blanc sec — le Hawthorne doit ben avoir ça en stock non?
Ton père m'a dit que tu fais un traiteur vendredi pour l'hôtel. Tu me gardes du magret ou je dis à Nathalie que t'as brûlé la bûche de Noël 2019 😏
you said 7 but it's 7:40 — jess texted me asking if you drowned in the beurre blanc again 😭 still at the Hawthorne?
oui calisse — new client swapped the whole tasting menu at 4pm. jess kept me from losing it but we're still cleaning up. 20 mins max.
tu m'aimes trop. see you soon.
ok i'll pour you something. also already turned your cooking playlist on, figured you'd need it.
oh no. how far in are you 😬
lol do you want me to send a fake 'confirmed! ✓' reply to buy you time or
fat rendered, aromatics in, half hour gone. calling the fishmonger now but if he's out of fresh sockeye i'm texting sienna to bring wine bc i will need it
client from the riverside booking just emailed — wants to swap the duck confit for salmon. it's thursday jess. THURSDAY. i've got confit started.
Stretch it if it's already resting, pull a backup protein off the shelf just in case. Don't rebuild from scratch 48 hrs out, that's how Thursdays get ugly fast.
Smart move. Text me Thursday before you plate. Also eat something before service — you always forget when you're running both jobs, Yves.
Pat the Côté account just pushed to 14 covers Thursday, I built the whole tasting menu around 10. Debating whether I stretch the braise or pivot entirely — what would you do?
Yeah okay that tracks. Got duck legs I can roast quick if it falls apart. Jess is on the Hawthorne morning shift with me tomorrow so I'll do all the mise Wednesday night after close.
Ugh let me check. They said Friday but honestly they're flexible, I just didn't push. I'll loop them in. Budget's around $90/head btw.
Fri 11th is already spoken, Jess and I have the Hawthorne anniversary gala setup that night. Thu the 10th is clean though — would that work for them?
Yves! Got a referral for you — Nordstrom HQ retirement dinner, 22 ppl, Friday July 11th. Client wants private chef situation, not hotel banquet. You still running that Thu/Fri catering window? 🙏
$90 for 22 is workable if they keep the ask tight. Send me dietary notes when you have them and I'll draft a menu tonight after shift.
Ugh, of course they waited. Let me check Jess's Thursday — she might already be on a split. Did they at least lock in headcount?
Jess is yours 2–4, I moved her to back-of-house. You're covered. Next time cc me the second a client goes quiet on docs — I'll send the nudge so it doesn't land on you at midnight.
32 confirmed, down from 38, so that's something. I'll pull a new ingredient list tonight. Just need that 2hr window or I'm scrambling into the dinner service.

Andrea — Bellfort party just sent their dietary sheet at 11pm. Two coeliacs and a shellfish allergy, blows up my whole Thursday mise en place. Can Jess cover the front desk 2–4 so I can start prepping earlier?
hey the Vandermeer event just bumped their amuse-bouche count from 30 to 52 — catering inbox just lit up, you catch it yet?
Jess is still on the floor til 3 but she says she's on it. you good to start the ramekin count solo until she's free?
saw it. already pinged Jess to pull extra mise en place trays. crisse, 52 covers on a Thursday window with zero heads-up 🙄
already at it. tell her merci and to bring coffee when she comes down or I'm staging the whole thing in silence 😅
Sent them to New Seasons with a straight face, called it 'artisan local sourcing.' Jess is absolutely deceased. Guest tipped $20 so we survive.
Room 412 just rang down asking if we can source 'authentic Québécois poutine' by 7pm. It's Beaverton, man. I almost said j'suis Québécois and even I'm not doing that tonight.
the Hawthorne Grand concierge experience 😭 see you at the 4 o'clock handoff?
lmaooo did you redirect them to that spot on Allen or just suffer in silence 💀
Strained my right wrist during catering mise en place Friday — still swollen this morning. Shift at the Hawthorne Grand hits at 7, wondering if I need to come in before or just tape it and move.
Three days of swelling isn't nothing. Can you do 6:30? Gets you out before your shift starts.
6:30 works, merci. Grip's the real problem — front desk check-ins are rough like this. Been icing but it's barely moved.
See you at 6:30. Nothing heavier than a pen until then. If it spikes before that, don't wait — urgent care.
Maudit — he told me he was going. I'm mid-shift at the Hawthorne right now but I'll call him on break. Book Tuesday at 11 please.
Done, held under Luc's name. Appreciate you being in the loop on this — he's lucky to have you.
Ha. Tell him that. He still argues with me about the butter. À bientôt, Dr. T.
Yves — Dr. Tremblay here. Your dad missed his 10am follow-up this morning, receptionist couldn't reach him. Any chance you can nudge him? Next opening's Tuesday the 3rd at 11.
40 couverts?? Jess is helping you at least no? Also Nath says bring tourtière filling if you have any left, she's been talking about it all week
Jess is on it with me yeah. Et dis-lui y'a plus de tourtière — used the last of it for Papa Luc's Tuesday coffee. Elle va survivre lol
Papa Luc ate ALL of it again 😂 you spoil that man. Ok 7h fine we'll save you a plate
Fran — heads up, j'serai pas là before 7 Friday. Catering mise en place at the Grand runs long this week, got a corporate lunch for 40 Saturday. Tell Nath don't wait on me.
Yves, bonjour! Parish hall's confirmed July 11 — expecting 60 for the summer social. You still able to handle the appetizer spread? Père Martin is already grateful, haha.
He's been having slow mornings, c'est tout. I'll get him there Sunday. À vendredi, mon Père.
Magnifique! Oh — we haven't seen Luc at the 9 o'clock in a few weeks. Everything well with him? Tell him we miss him.
Confirmed. 60 is manageable, I'll need the kitchen by 2 Friday. Sienna's off that weekend so she may help me plate.
Yeah they're confirmed, new spot tho — row C near the fountain. Want me to give Priya a heads-up you're coming early?
Ha, Marcel's not back till late July. I'll text you soon as he confirms his dates — tell Luc to hang tight 😄
Hey Rodrigo — Chamomile Dreams still setting up this Saturday? Need their dried lavender for a Hawthorne Grand brunch catering I'm running Thursday. Trying to lock my ingredient list tonight.
Please do, merci. Also — any chance Marcel the honey guy is back? Papa Luc keeps asking and I told him I'd look into it.
Bernard — besoin du sirop ambré pour jeudi, catering client wants a miso-maple glaze for the whole spread. You still have the 4L tins or did I miss the window again 😅
Thursday 8am at the hotel works — Jess is on front desk if I'm still in the back doing mise en place, she'll grab it. Merci Bernard.
Perfect. I'll throw in a small jar of the smoked birch syrup we just got from Abitibi — new batch, tell me what you think. À jeudi 👋
Got two left, holding one for you right now. Want me to drop it at The Hawthorne Thursday morning or you swinging by the warehouse?
Yves whatever you're cooking over there is making my whole hallway smell unreal and I haven't eaten since like noon. What IS that??
Just Papa Luc called right as I was dropping the shallots. We're good, he's dramatic, I love him. Bag's coming.
I want them SO bad. Also I heard you on the phone speaking French earlier, sounded kind of intense? Everything ok? 😅
Catering mise en place for Friday's client — duck confit, shallot jam, the whole situation. Leftovers bag on your door by 9 if you want.
Window's yours 1–5 but Marcos has the immersion til 2, grab it after. Bay 3's open if you need overnight cold storage.
Dana — locked in for Thursday window? Got 14 duck legs to break down for the Rosen event Friday, need the 6qt immersion. Jess is rolling with me to handle the marinade side.
Works — we'll start cold work first. Jess is grabbing the tarragon from Beaverton Market. Bay 3 stays ours through Saturday AM yeah? Pickup's early.
Bay 3's yours through Saturday 10am, I'll tag it. Tell Jess to stay away from my good shears this time 😂
Théodore — dates first, oui? Send me the Saturday and I'll cross it against my Hawthorne shifts. Papa Luc seriously cannot stop talking about that Beaumont job, he's worse than Émile.
March 14th, early evening. Luc told Father Renaud your tourtière last Christmas made him emotional. So honestly you're already hired in everyone's mind, we're just waiting on you 😂
Ah maudit, he told the whole parish about the tourtière. I'm pretty sure that Saturday I'm off the desk at the Grand — let me confirm by Thursday and I'll send you a rough menu.

Yves! Your father mentioned you're catering the Beaumont retirement dinner next month. Father Renaud wanted me to ask — any chance you'd do St. Agatha's spring supper too? Maybe 40 people, mid-March. Luc bragged about you all through coffee hour 😄
